title: EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies:
EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies!
